svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, #121212); color-scheme: light dark;

div.div:
Types of XSS: -
Persistent(Stored XSS): - xss code stored in our database
Self-xss: - xss code executed via browser console
Non-persistent(Reflected XSS): - xss code that is written in the url query param, that goes to the server
DOM based XSS: - xss code that is written in the url hash, and that does not goes to the server
